data.title: Circle stock falls 10% after analyst downgrade and Drift Protocol investigation, fueling worries about USDC exposure, crypto regulations, and market volatility.
data.description: The company behind a stablecoin is under scrutiny following a stock downgrade and fallout from an exploit in the Drift Protocol, leading to apprehension regarding its exposure to USDC, regulation in the cryptocurrency space, and risks in the market.

data.title: Xanadu Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In the beginning of 2026, Xanadu, a tech company, went public and as a result, it started the year with enhanced financial resources. This will enable them to progress with their multi-year technology plan which focuses on improving fault tolerance, expanding manufacturing operations, and increasing commercial usage.
Update: Western Pacific Trust Co. to change auditor. Stay tuned for details. #news #finance

data.title: South Bow Announces Timing of First-quarter 2026 Results, Conference Call and Webcast, and Annual General Meeting
data.description: South Bow Corp, a company listed on both TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol SOBO, announced that it will disclose its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, after the market's closure. The report will include key figures and data regarding the company's performance during the initial months of the year.

data.title: Ovintiv Announces Closing of Anadarko Asset Sale
data.description: In Denver on April 9, 2026, Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE: OVV) (TSX: OVV) finalized the all-cash transaction for the sale of its Anadarko assets situated in Oklahoma, fetching $3.0 billion. Post standard closing modifications, the sale is projected to yield significant proceeds for the Company.

data.title: Gates Industrial Announces Fourth-Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Date
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Gates Industrial Corporation plc (NYSE:GTES) announced that it will reveal its first-quarter financial results on Friday, May 1, 2026, before the market opens. The company's management will conduct a webcast and conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to go over the details.

data.title: Vista Gold to Present at the Mining Forum Europe 2026 Conference
data.description: Vista Gold Corp. disclosed that its President and CEO, Frederick H. Earnest, is set to speak at the Mining Forum Europe 2026 conference in Zurich, Switzerland. The presentation by Mr. Earnest is planned for Monday, April 13, at 2:00 p.m. CEST (6:00 a.m. MDT or 8:00 a.m. EDT). Interested individuals can access the live stream via a provided link or on the company's official website at www.vist. This event signifies an important opportunity for Vista Gold Corp. to engage with industry players and stakeholders.

data.title: Nutrien Announces Release Dates for First Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call
data.description: SASKATOON, Saskatchewan--Nutrien Ltd. shared that it is set to reveal its first quarter 2026 results post-market closure on Wednesday, May 6. Following this, on Thursday, May 7, a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT will be held by Nutrien to delve into the results and offer insights on future prospects. Interested investors can join the call by dialing 1-800-990-2777 or 1-416-855-9085 using conference ID: 89180. Additionally, a webcast of the call will be accessible via Nutrien’s Investor Events and Presentation page.

data.title: Allied Files Management Information Circular and Announces CFO Transition
data.description: Today, Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX:AP.UN) revealed that the management information circular for the Annual Meeting of Unitholders on May 12, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern time, has been dispatched. The Meeting will be conducted exclusively in a virtual format through a live audio webcast on meetings.lumiconnect.com/400-745-064-886.

data.title: Fastly to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Fastly, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLY), a prominent global edge cloud platform company, is scheduled to announce its financial performance for Q1 of 2026 after the market closes on May 6, 2026. Following this release, a conference call for investors will take place on the same day at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET. Those interested in participating should pre-register and join the call through a provided link at least 15 minutes before the scheduled start time. Confirmation emails will be sent to registrants.

data.title: A Charge to Lead: Commencement Speaker Congressman Robert C. "Bobby" Scott to Inspire Hampton University Class of 2026
data.description: A prominent figure renowned for his commitment to fairness, a native of the region, and a champion for future generations, Congressman Scott is coming back to Hampton to inspire the forthcoming leaders. Hampton, Virginia, April 9, 2026 - Hampton University is set to host Congressman Robert C. "Bobby" Scott, a respected representative from Virginia, known for his advocacy for justice and longevity in service.

data.title: Firan Technology Group Corporation Announces Results of AGM
data.description: Firan Technology Group Corporation (TSX: FTG) (OTCQX: FTGFF) disclosed the outcome of its annual general meeting of shareholders in Toronto, Ontario on April 9, 2026. The company confirmed the election of all six director candidates listed in its February 23, 2026, management information circular.

data.title: Constellation Brands' Earnings Slide But Stock Regains Key Level
data.description: In the fourth quarter, the beer business saw a return to growth for the company, although they decided to withdraw their fiscal 2028 guidance. Constellation Brands' earnings experienced a decline, but the stock managed to regain a key level during this period.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Extend Rally On Iran War News, Amazon; CPI Inflation, Nvidia Chipmaker Due
data.description: Stocks continued their upward trend on Thursday, influenced by news regarding the situation in Iran and positive performance by Amazon. Key players like Taiwan Semiconductor, Nvidia chipmaker, and concerns about CPI inflation also contributed to market movements. Dow Jones Futures reflect the ongoing rally, with investors closely monitoring these developments.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Closes Up 275 Points; Western Digital Roars Higher After Pullback Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, despite underwhelming inflation data, the Dow Jones index showed an upward trend, closing higher by 275 points. CoreWeave stock experienced significant fluctuation following the announcement of a new deal with Meta. Additionally, Western Digital shares surged after a recent pullback. This information was highlighted in live coverage without any specific source mentioned.
